text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 173 

MSIS_ID 

LABEL: Encrypted State Assigned Beneficiary Unique Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: A state-assigned unique identification number used to identify a Medicaid/CHIP enrolled beneficiary 
and any claims submitted to the system. Also referred to as the Medicaid Statistical Information 
System Identifier (MSIS_ID). 

SHORT NAME: MSIS_ID 

LONG NAME: MSIS_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 32
